heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear, some clouds north late.

heading: Saturday
text: Periods of clouds. Maybe a few afternoon snow showers. Cold.
temperature: Low 20s to low 30s north to south.

heading: Sunday
temperature: Upper 30s to low 40s northeast, 40s west and south

heading: Monday
text: Lots of clouds, some sun. A stray shower far north.
